pairs.expected_answer: Automatic mode, Jog mode, EDISIMU mode, MDI/MDA mode, user tables, tool table, utilities mode and configurable mode.

questions.es: Que modos de trabajo estan disponibles en el monitor y teclado?
questions.en: What work modes are available on the monitor and keyboard?

pairs.expected_answer: The FOCUS key is used to switch between the different windows of the screen.

questions.es: Para que sirve la tecla focus en el monitor y teclado?
questions.en: What does the FOCUS key do on the monitor and keyboard?

pairs.expected_answer: Both the axis key and the direction key must be pressed to jog the axis.

questions.es: Que se debe pulsar para mover un eje desde el panel jog?
questions.en: What must be pressed to jog an axis from the JOG panel?

pairs.expected_answer: Press START to go ahead with the home search or ESC to cancel it.

questions.es: Que tecla confirma la busqueda de referencia?
questions.en: Which key confirms the home search?

pairs.expected_answer: Press ENTER to assume the entered preset value.

questions.es: Que tecla confirma el valor del preset de coordenadas?
questions.en: Which key confirms the coordinate preset value?

pairs.expected_answer: Use F for feedrate, S for spindle speed and T for tool; then press START to assume the value.

questions.es: Que teclas se utilizan para fijar el avance la velocidad o la herramienta?
questions.en: Which keys are used to set the feedrate, speed or tool?
